name: @carbonenginejs/runtime-audio
description: Complete CarbonEngineJS audio domain with a graph-only ./trinity entry and optional Web Audio realization.

scripts.lint: npm run build:npm && node --check npm/dist/index.js && node --check test/audio-classes.test.js && node --check test/audio-behavior.test.js && node --check test/audio-culling.test.js && node --check test/audio-system.test.js && node --check test/audio-backend-isolation.test.js && node --check test/audio-ui-playback.test.js && node --check test/audio-rtpc-adoption.test.js && node --check test/music-injection.test.js && node --check test/trinity-subpath.test.js && node --check test/music-engine.test.js && node --check scripts/build_npm.js && node --check scripts/build_demo_library.js && node --check scripts/check_repository_text.js && node --check scripts/generate_trinity.js && node --check scripts/proof_decorator_transform.js && node --check scripts/serve_demo.js && node --check demo/demo.js && node --check rollup.config.mjs
scripts.check: npm run lint && npm test && npm run proof:decorators && npm run check:text && npm run docs:check
